Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import pymelsec; print\(dir\(pymelsec\)\); from pymelsec import Type3E, Type1E; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(Type3E.__init__\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from pymelsec import Type3E; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(Type3E.__init__\)\); print\([m for m in dir\(Type3E\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from pymelsec import Type3E; import inspect; print\('batch_read:', inspect.signature\(Type3E.batch_read\)\); print\('batch_write:', inspect.signature\(Type3E.batch_write\)\); print\('connect:', inspect.signature\(Type3E.connect\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from pymelsec import constants; print\(dir\(constants\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from pymelsec.constants import DT; print\({k:v for k,v in vars\(DT\).items\(\) if not k.startswith\('_'\)}\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import pymcprotocol; import inspect; plc = pymcprotocol.Type3E\(\); print\('batchread_bitunits:', inspect.signature\(plc.batchread_bitunits\)\); print\('batchwrite_bitunits:', inspect.signature\(plc.batchwrite_bitunits\)\); print\('connect:', inspect.signature\(plc.connect\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import pymcprotocol, inspect; plc = pymcprotocol.Type3E\(\); print\('attrs:', [a for a in dir\(plc\) if not a.startswith\('_'\)]\); print\('setaccessopt:', inspect.signature\(plc.setaccessopt\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from pymodbus.client import ModbusTcpClient; import inspect; c = ModbusTcpClient\('x'\); print\(inspect.signature\(c.read_coils\)\); print\(inspect.signature\(c.read_discrete_inputs\)\); print\(inspect.signature\(c.write_coil\)\)")
